storage.withdrawalBehavior: Delete every Smart Mode localStorage key immediately while allowing the current on-screen result to remain session-only.
storage.clearDataBehavior: Delete consent, profile/form state, recommendation history, and outcomes; reset the interface and output actions.

retention.automaticExpiry: not implemented; user-controlled deletion is mandatory and visible

sharingAndExports.printOrPDF: Public-safe plan fields only; browser print may be used for PDF.
sharingAndExports.jsonExport: Public-safe plan fields only; excludes profile, exact location, inventory list, history, and outcomes.
sharingAndExports.shareCard: Public-safe presentation label and plan fields only.
sharingAndExports.noJavaScript: Static field worksheet and boundary guidance; no persistence or evaluation claim.

analytics.rule: No new Smart Mode analytics event may be added until a named product decision defines the exact reader job, event, payload, retention, consent, deletion, and exclusion rules.

deferredArchitecture.accounts: Deferred until local-first repeat use demonstrates a genuine need and an approved privacy, support, recovery, and deletion model exists.
deferredArchitecture.crossProductIdentity: Deferred; Smart Mode state may not become a shared ecosystem identity profile.
deferredArchitecture.remoteSavedWorkspace: Deferred until local-first utility and recovery needs justify remote persistence.
deferredArchitecture.nativeWrapper: Deferred unless tested native utility such as secure local settings, device-authenticated lock, user-controlled notifications, or native share/file behavior is required. Wrapper-only packaging is not sufficient.

releaseEvidence: clear data deletes all keys and consent
copy, JSON, print/PDF, share-card, and no-JavaScript behavior
no remote requests containing private state
